violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Shelving in walk-in cooler needs to be deep cleaned. - Fan and condenser needs to be cleaned in walk-in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walk-in freezer has large build up of ice on floor and ceiling.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
